column1: On a lighter note, Ryan left her phone at home. Desperate times call for desperate measures. 🤣 #dalimuseum

She's Adorable! Denis, maybe Ryan would appreciate having a phone like this of her own. Decorate a phone like this for her. Everything found on Amazon, including the phone. 😊( Except the land line, of course. )

Had to pull my friend away from that phone😂🤣
It’s pretty amazing and I highly suggest a field trip over to The Dali for this fantastic exhibit going on through mid October.

it's a normal vintage style/like phone with a painted fake lobster on it. Very cool. Easy to make for your daughter. Did a quick search. Amazon sells that exact phone minus the 🦞☺️
